skill.name: gpt-taste
skill.description: Elite UX/UI & Advanced GSAP Motion Engineer. Enforces Python-driven true randomization for layout variance, strict AIDA page structure, wide editorial typography (bans 6-line wraps), gapless bento grids, strict GSAP ScrollTriggers (pinning, stacking, scrubbing), inline micro-images, and massive section spacing.
skill.summary: Award-winning frontend design skill with GSAP animations, AIDA structure, gapless grids, and Python-driven randomization for layout variance.
skill.author: leonxlnx

security_audit.summary: Evaluated 45 static security findings. All detections are false positives: backtick syntax is markdown formatting, cryptographic flags triggered by design terms (randomization, seed), and network flag is legitimate picsum.photos placeholder service. This is a markdown design prompt skill with no executable code, no malicious operations, and no confirmed security risks.

content.user_title: Create award-winning frontend designs with GSAP animations
content.value_statement: Standard AI models generate predictable layouts with poor spacing and generic components. This skill enforces AWWWARDS-level design standards with Python-driven randomization, GSAP motion, and mathematically perfect grids.
actual_capabilities: Generate AWWWARDS-level homepage layouts with cinematic hero sections and massive typography
Implement Python-based randomization to prevent repetitive design patterns
Build mathematically perfect gapless bento grids using grid-flow-dense
Create advanced GSAP animations including scroll pinning, text scrubbing, and card stacking
Enforce strict AIDA page structure with premium navigation and high-contrast CTAs
Add professional ambient backgrounds with radial blurs and grainy mesh gradients
limitations: Skill is a design prompt guide, not an executable script - requires AI to interpret directives
Images use placeholder services (picsum.photos) which may not match specific brand aesthetics
Requires Tailwind CSS and GSAP dependencies in the target project

use_cases.title: Agency web project launches
use_cases.description: Generate award-caliber landing pages with cinematic animations for client presentations and pitch decks

use_cases.title: Startup landing pages
use_cases.description: Create impressive product pages with GSAP scroll effects that impress investors and early adopters

use_cases.title: Portfolio site redesigns
use_cases.description: Transform static portfolios into motion-rich showcases with stacking cards and parallax reveals

prompt_templates.title: Basic landing page request
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a landing page for [product name] targeting [audience]. Focus on [primary feature].
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner request for a simple project page

prompt_templates.title: Feature showcase with animations
prompt_templates.prompt: Build a feature showcase page with GSAP scroll pinning. The product is [description] and the main value prop is [tagline].
prompt_templates.scenario: Mid-level request with specific animation requirements

prompt_templates.title: Full AIDA campaign page
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a complete AIDA campaign page. Product: [name]. Hero should emphasize [emotion]. Features need [specific animations]. CTAs should drive [action].
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced request with full framework requirements

prompt_templates.title: Bento grid product catalog
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a bento grid layout showing [N] products. Each card should have [specific hover behavior]. Grid must be gapless. Images: use [theme] keywords.
prompt_templates.scenario: Complex grid layout with custom interactions

output_examples.input: Create a landing page for a premium coffee subscription service
output_examples.output: A cinematic hero section with centered typography and dark radial background. Below: a 4-card bento grid with rich imagery, each card featuring hover scale animations. A pinned GSAP section on the left scrolls through product benefits while images scale and fade on the right. Final CTA with massive contrast button.

output_examples.input: Build a SaaS features page with scroll animations
output_examples.output: Floating glass pill navigation. Hero with 2-line maximum H1 in ultra-wide container. Interest section with mathematically interlocking grid cards using grid-flow-dense. Desire section with text scrubbing reveals and card stacking. Action section with high-contrast CTA.

output_examples.input: Design a portfolio with GSAP motion effects
output_examples.output: Minimal split navigation. Hero with artistic asymmetry and floating image overlay. Horizontal accordions for projects. Infinite marquee for client logos. Testimonial carousel with overlapping portraits. Deep radial blur ambient backgrounds throughout.

best_practices: Always include Python randomization step to break AI defaults and ensure unique layouts
Verify H1 container width (max-w-5xl or wider) before generating to prevent 6-line wraps
Apply grid-flow-dense on every bento grid and mathematically verify column interlocking
anti_patterns: Avoid using Inter font - use Satoshi, Cabinet Grotesk, Outfit, or Geist instead
Do not include meta-labels like SECTION 01 or QUESTION 05 - they look unprofessional
Never use narrow hero containers that force H1 text to wrap 4+ lines

faq.question: What dependencies are required for this skill?
faq.answer: Tailwind CSS for styling and GSAP with ScrollTrigger for animations. The skill requires React or a compatible framework.

faq.question: Can this work with Next.js or other frameworks?
faq.answer: Yes, the design patterns work with any React-based framework including Next.js, Gatsby, or Remix.

faq.question: How does the Python randomization work?
faq.answer: The skill simulates deterministic randomization using character count modulo math to select layouts, fonts, and components without actual Python execution.

faq.question: What makes designs AWWWARDS-worthy?
faq.answer: Cinematic spacing, GSAP motion, mathematically perfect grids, high-contrast CTAs, and professional typography without cheap meta-labels.

faq.question: Can I customize the image sources?
faq.answer: Yes, replace picsum.photos URLs with your actual image assets. The skill uses keyword seeds for placeholder matching.

faq.question: How do I prevent horizontal scroll bugs?
faq.answer: Wrap the page in main with overflow-x-hidden and max-w-full classes to prevent off-screen animations from causing scrollbars.
